title: Clarity
description: displays your active potion effects with precise, second-accurate countdown timers and amplifier levels.
body:
**Clarity: The Potion Effect HUD, Your Way. 🛠️**

What it does: Clarity is an essential, highly customizable client-side mod that replaces the standard, bland potion icons with a dedicated Heads-Up Display (HUD). It puts you in complete control of your active effects, ensuring you know your exact status, every second.

Why you need it:

⚡ **Always Precise:** Stop guessing! Get a crystal-clear, real-time, second-accurate display of potion icons, amplifier levels, and the remaining duration. Perfect for PvPers, speedrunners, and anyone who needs precise timing.

🌈 **Limitless Customization:** Dive into the Mod Menu and unleash the power of personalization! This is your HUD.

- Change text and timer colors.

- Adjust the size and scale of the HUD.

- Pick its exact location on your screen.

- Toggle what information is visible.

🚨 **Stay Alert:** Intuitive color-coded timers warn you when your buffs or debuffs are running low, giving you a crucial heads-up before expiry.

Stop worrying about timers and focus on playing. Download Clarity and customize your perfect HUD today! 🖱️🚀
